channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: How President Trump’s Immigration Order Will Feed the Stablecoin Economy, Bitcoin ATMs
item.description: When the Trump family faced pressure from banks, it embraced crypto. Now, immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally face a similar choice.

item.title: The institutional edge: moomoo targets Wall Street-grade trading tools for retail crypto investors
item.description: The brokerage giant says the future of investing won’t be defined by asset access alone but by the quality of tools investors get.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "Working ₿etter." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE43S3hlX2Nfa1pFd0tjMWdWMTh5eWpYLVBRT1M1dWZkMTJWV0dmXzJReEJTOHVjTkJKWU5UUENpVS1VUlpPeWZNamo0Nk8xZk5JbllPRks5bTE5eTRsVDR4UWhB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin's wild days are over — and Trace Mayer says that's a good thing
item.description: The creator of the Mayer Multiple argues bitcoin’s growing economic substance is compressing volatility and attracting deeper capital.

item.title: Bitcoin price targets $78K as BTC holders defend 'strongest near-term support'
item.description: Bitcoin’s bounce from a key holder cost-basis level has improved the case for further upside, with historical data pointing to $101,000 as a potential best-case target.

item.title: Vietnam proposes allowing SMEs to use digital assets as loan collateral
item.description: Vietnam’s Ministry of Finance has proposed letting SMEs use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as loan collateral.

item.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
item.description: Gravity Bridge was drained of roughly $5.4 million in a suspected signing key compromise, prompting validators to halt the bridge while an investigation is underway.

item.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
item.description: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.

item.title: Bitcoin dip buyers curb selling but questionable spot, futures volumes highlight weakness
item.description: Bitcoin dip buyers are present near range lows, and new leveraged longs opened in the zone but the volumes lack the size needed to reverse the downtrend.

item.title: Vietnam's Finance Ministry Proposes Allowing SMEs to Use Digital and Virtual Assets as Loan Collateral According to Viet Nam News, Vietnam's Ministry of Finance has proposed allowing SMEs to use digital assets, virtual assets and intellectual property as c - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1jTXJvck1TclRFQ3NOcWpyT1hkc2xIaEt4N3BCSHRJZDFadXd3VHNjYXdmak5BcjZKVUZiUWE4bklnVmdySGVjeUhXeWl5UnQyclBGOVU0Wm5QZHVUZEJ1Yzd2RQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Vietnam's Finance Ministry Propo…

item.title: XRP Ledger's new proposal blocks the flash loan attacks costing DeFi hundreds of millions
item.description: A draft XRPL amendment notes that flash loan attacks are "structurally impossible" on the network because of how its transactions are built, an architectural quirk that has spared the chain from the exploit class that has cost Ethereum DeF…

item.title: Bitcoin is at ‘pivotal level’ as $65K downside risk looms: Analyst
item.description: While Bitcoin is hovering around $73,000, a crypto trader says the current setup is “different from the previous breakdown in February.”

item.title: Senator Lummis says China will 'write the rules' of the new financial era if CLARITY fails
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance the CLARITY Act in May, but it must still pass both chambers of Congress before heading to the president's desk.

item.title: Are you getting desperate, lad? Maybe keep your crypto millions for something else. 😂 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9Ca196QUhmVl9maGd4VUFxU3lmZVFJMGt3bVNrc0k5Q0JTOE5vZW1ZWjRnUmx1eDRvWWp0aFl2dEl6Q3lfTzZFTlNWNnI1Vm8xZFhBQTZSb3VfZmxuUDZLY3RBZmI?oc=5" target="_blank">Are you getting desperate, lad?…

item.title: Circle freezes $12.6M of USDC linked to privacy protocol Zama
item.description: The $12.6 million in USDC was likely frozen in connection with an ongoing but unrelated civil court case, according to onchain sleuth ZachXBT.

item.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
item.description: Fuller allegedly diverted $6.2 million for personal use and $5.5M for Ponzi-like payments; only 3% of funds went to crypto trading.

item.title: U.S. says it seized about $1 billion in Iranian crypto as pressure campaign expands
item.description: The seizure, falling under "Operation Economic Fury," aims to restrict Iran's access to overseas revenue, banking networks, and crypto infrastructure.

item.title: Florida Candidate Liquidates $800K in Bitcoin to Bankroll Congressional Bid
item.description: A Republican candidate jockeying to represent Florida’s 22nd Congressional District liquidated Bitcoin to help fuel his political bid.

item.title: I'm looking for a long position on #Bitcoin. The reasoning is quite simple is that we're constantly bottoming out on the 30th/31st. On top of that: there's a relatively clear confirmation on multiple timeframes on the RSI that we're cooling down and that we're slightly - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5CdVMyTUMtcHBiUEJtb0o0ODYxV0l5SW1TOEIxTlBOamJMcTVQdzlldGxEVEZhZjZKTXhyc0M1MnVKSXN5Q1FBSUpEb2xZOHVxbzl1dHVRYXJBZEFHdnZEOXpsZw?oc=5" target="_blank">I'm looking for a long position …

item.title: Wall Street’s trillion-dollar dilemma: Why AI-powered hackers are keeping big banks off the blockchain
item.description: CertiK CEO and co-founder Ronghui Gu says April was the worst month for DeFi in four years with exploits on 27 out of 30 days.

item.title: "This one time, Bitcoin went from $0.06 to $0.36 and then it crashed down to $0.21" "Another time, bitcoin went from $0.85 to $29 and then crashed to $3" "Another time, bitcoin went all the way to $213 and then crashed all the way to $70" This is why we HODL! - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBBQVFIVlZxZVpLYXVySkpWVkhzeUdWWkZRdXdFZVBkOXFXa2QySmRlZXBBZWkxdjE3MmZkOGhsVnVYT1ZJOFM3UGtYa1pScTBJRkRfdDBRdnJKTXB2eEJMcmFuZ3RFeDA?oc=5" target="_blank">"This one time, Bitcoin wen…

item.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots
item.description: The SEC charged Texas man Nathan Fuller with raising $12.3 million from 150 investors through a crypto fraud scheme built around fake AI trading bots.

item.title: What Is an AI Prompt Injection Attack? The Hidden Threat Hijacking Your Chatbots
item.description: Hackers can hijack ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini with nothing but a sentence. OpenAI says the problem may never be fully solved. Here is what it is, how it works, and how to stay safe.

item.title: When the market is bad, we build: Inside Binance’s bold 2030 master plan
item.description: Established crypto firms will merge with traditional finance, but neither Wall Street bankers nor corporate giants will take over the crypto industry, said Binance’s Head of VIP and Institutional, Catherine Chen.

item.title: Hyperliquid could become a ‘financial services juggernaut’ as DeFi expands, says Grayscale
item.description: The digital asset manager says Hyperliquid is emerging as a blockchain-based financial infrastructure platform with the potential to expand beyond crypto trading and challenge parts of traditional derivatives and exchange markets.

item.title: Ethereum is not a company. It is global infrastructure controlled by no entity or consortium — like the Internet That’s why institutions bring the most assets onto Ethereum ETH is not a stock or valued on fees ETH is productive money — and that’s the exponential - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9USW91ZUhCRmwzQ0dhTzdVVmNmLW5kai1GWmRqcFEyazdrbUVxQXVTeG5vOGNyaWZaRm9JdFVON1ZCaFBvelg4QjZzbXpDY0JSSUR2N1dRdzc4VmdObXRPOE9KWlU?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum is not a company. It i…

item.title: XRP ETFs add $35 million as bitcoin and ether funds lost $2 billion in late May
item.description: From May 20 to May 29, XRP funds took in $35 million while bitcoin and ether ETFs lost roughly $2 billion combined, with Ripple’s earlier reported XRP treasury plan still awaiting confirmation.

item.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
item.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury space still has fair share of ‘carnival barkers’: BSTR founder
item.description: BSTR co-founder Sean Bill says many Bitcoin treasury companies lack the “ability to actually deploy Bitcoin.”

item.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in Iranian crypto, Treasury secretary says
item.description: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US has seized roughly $1 billion in Iranian crypto assets, double the figure disclosed in late April.

item.title: Crypto Fans Remix NVIDIA's Garage-to-Empire Meme - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTFByUk1mTVdUOW90V29MOUVKYUU3aDM2RjZpM0xRejMzc00xUGtMYjFTQVBwM3RwMVllM2dUYUFWUU9aWk9mTVpGZ0xxZm8yZWFyUjQ3MWNCMA?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Fans Remix NVIDIA's Garage-to-Empire Meme…

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, XRP, dogecoin lag a nine-week stocks rally as ETF demand cools
item.description: The S&P 500 posted its longest weekly winning streak since 2023 and Brent oil stabilized near $92 on US-Iran ceasefire hopes. The biggest cryptocurrencies still drifted lower, with Hyperliquid's HYPE the only major name to rally.

item.title: Bitcoin’s biggest quantum risk may not be wallet keys. An early investor fears something bigger
item.description: Andrew Gault, the venture capitalist who funded the quantum hardware labs now threatening bitcoin, says the industry is looking in the wrong place. Google's own security team moved in the same direction in March.

item.title: Bitcoin retail sentiment still matters, says Swan Bitcoin CEO
item.description: Swan Bitcoin CEO Cory Klippsten said it is important to pay attention to retail sentiment around Bitcoin, as ownership is still far from concentrated and “it’s not like Blackrock owns the Bitcoin.”

item.title: Ethereum OG is dumping $ETH! Over the past week, an Ethereum OG sold 55,000 $ETH($112.25M) and 9,442 $wstETH($24M) at an average price of $2,041 per ETH . intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9sRUZpd0MzUzdTODk2UWY5VzdFSHkweTVIMFdPNnJDNjdPSC16WnhuV3RnOEk1OTBNcTR4NkhORlhOXzIxanZINzBJTVBmQndTc3ZIVjRvTEZraEJGX3FhR2dR?oc=5" target="_blank">Ethereum OG is dumping $ETH! Over …

item.title: Bitcoin dip buyers place $500M in bids as $70K retest looms
item.description: Over $500 million in Bitcoin bids now sit near $70,000, while options traders and futures positions converge around the same level.

item.title: ‘Extraordinarily unusual’ for CFTC to reverse Gemini settlement deal: Ex-chair
item.description: As the CFTC and Gemini work together to seek a court's reversal of a 2025 settlement, one of the agency’s former chairs said the public “deserves a better explanation.”

item.title: JUST IN: ethereum:0x514910771af9ca656af840dff83e8264ecf986ca futures now trade 24/7 on @CMEGroup, the world's largest CFTC-regulated derivatives exchange. This milestone unlocks enhanced institutional access and reflects the growing maturity of - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9RUmJUcFA3cmJMTzZ6QkE4cjF3Y0tUdFV3ekFhX094dlVhSmFGcnFzSThPMkt3S2hZNEgyT0RMOFV1eFE5RGZpR1ItaVEwUGVORlpHajRsTVpMRUhYd1NN?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: ethereum:0x514910771af9ca656a…

item.title: 'He’s Full of Shit': JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon Takes Aim at Coinbase CEO Over Clarity Act
item.description: Dimon vowed to fight the passage of the crypto market structure bill until the bitter end.

item.title: Bitcoin adoption continues to accelerate globally, with strong momentum shaping its next growth phase. New waves of demand are reinforcing Bitcoin’s expanding global footprint. ₿ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE0yWnoxeUhBeXgzdTRQakNQZllxVmhqQlRGWC1sTVFNbE5HM290SnlrVDhZYW1qcTAwNUJVdzlDOE1aUVhKRHhHd3B1V19ZZXlXUlpYZk0yTEN1bm1Q?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin adoption continues to accelerate g…

item.title: CFTC backs crypto perpetual contracts, issues advisory on 24/7 trading
item.description: The CFTC issued notices affecting platforms seeking to offer cryptocurrency perpetual futures contracts, including a no-action position for Coinbase and approval for Kalshi.

item.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent Says US Has 'Grabbed' $1 Billion in Crypto From Iran
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. has "outright grabbed" roughly $1 billion worth of cryptocurrencies from Iran via seizures.

item.title: Celsius Founder Alex Mashinsky Files to Have 12-Year Crypto Fraud Sentence Vacated
item.description: Celsius founder and former CEO Alex Mashinsky hopes to have his prison sentence vacated, claiming a legal conflict tied to Sam Bankman-Fried.

item.title: ‘The banks will not accept it’: Dimon escalates battle over stablecoin rewards in CLARITY Act debate
item.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong and warned the current CLARITY Act framework could ultimately fail, as banks and crypto firms clash over whether stablecoin issuers should be allowed to offer yield-bearing r…

item.title: Coinbase Becomes First US Exchange Allowed to Offer Global Crypto Perps Trading
item.description: Coinbase can offer U.S. customers access to offshore crypto perpetual futures, a risky form of leveraged crypto trading, the CFTC said Friday.

item.title: Lenovo Stock Doubles in May on AI Server Boom—Best Month in 27 Years
item.description: The world's biggest PC maker surged 109% in May after AI revenue hit 38% of quarterly sales. Goldman Sachs more than doubled its target.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin: The crypto ecosystem must not go down the path of OpenAI（ARCHIVE FOOTAGE ） On July 3, 2025, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin stated in an EthCC speech video that the crypto industry must not repeat the mistakes of OpenAI, which first - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1ZeFAxR2x3aTF0M0dudnhfRlR5UjVMdXh3cHkzNGhvaXNpQ3ZSYVdlc3NrZU5Ub01KbU9MdmIydUczcWxvUW1NZXBmYXdCX1JzcDZfVWNMMW1Dbnp2QXQzWTNIOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Vitalik Buterin: The crypto ecos…

item.title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
item.description: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

item.title: You Can Now Read the US Constitution via the Bitcoin Blockchain
item.description: One of America's most important historical documents will forever be inscribed on a Bitcoin block, thanks to someone's $83 transaction fee.

item.title: NYSE Parent Isn't 'Freaked Out' by Hyperliquid—It's Learning From the Crypto Perps Giant
item.description: Intercontinental Exchange CEO Jeffrey Sprecher said his company and Hyperliquid are learning from each other as crypto perps gain ground.

item.title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
item.description: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

item.title: The current drama around the Ethereum Foundation (EF) and the noise around the price of ETH are missing the big picture. While I genuinely understand this debate, it will not determine who leads the next decade of financial infrastructure.This is one stakehol - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1SaHBOWUluSXlSbW16MUhWNVdPZlhEeXdJUG5jeTZLLW9sZmFUb0ZBdDUyc2RVVlJySHRLTHJKRlU5ZHJldHo3aWxScXpKXzhGUmtDZ1JVdlRTQmc2YThN?oc=5" target="_blank">The current drama around the Ethereum …

item.title: AI Models Can’t Agree on Basic Facts Most of the Time, Study Shows
item.description: A new study gave five frontier AI models 1,000 real-world claims to fact-check. They disagreed on 67% of them.

item.title: alon (@a1lon9) / Posts / X - x.com
item.description: alon (@a1lon9) / Posts / X x.com

item.title: Bitcoin plums new six-week lows as analyst eyes BTC price dip 'end' at $72K
item.description: Bitcoin saw its lowest levels since the middle of April as BTC price action continued ot diverge from thriving US stock markets.

item.title: U.S. regulator says 24/7 trading is great for crypto, may not be fit for other sectors
item.description: As the CFTC issued landmark approvals for crypto perpetual futures contracts, it explained in a related advisory that round-the-clock activity isn't right for all.

item.title: Wintermute Is Providing Liquidity on Kalshi and Polymarket, Linking Two Giants
item.description: Wintermute is providing liquidity on the two biggest prediction markets, linking flows for both firms, according to a source familiar with the matter.

item.title: Mass deployment of AI agents is a disaster waiting to happen, says CertiK CEO
item.description: Ronghui Gu shares tips on how to isolate AI agents while testing them so they do not have access to critical personal information or digital assets.

item.title: Clarity Act Risks Regulation Without Oversight, Brookings Fellow Says
item.description: As Congress weighs crypto legislation, Aaron Klein says the CFTC needs more resources, independence and coordination to oversee digital markets.
